title: Gate-state: Thermal Swooping Wing - inherited tree curation baseline
body: Gate-state report: result non-green by design because practice:fitness:informational reports CRITICAL. Failure surface: .agent/memory/active/napkin.md hard lines/chars plus critical prose-width; .agent/memory/operational/open-questions.md hard lines/chars plus critical prose-width; .agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations/2026-05-26-feathered-torrid-n2-cycle-1-candidates.md critical chars/prose-width. Diagnosis: knowledge surfaces accumulated dense closeout material; response is curation/homing/rotation, not trimming. Proposed next step: open a narrow curator claim for these three surfaces; do not move/delete comms files per standing direction.
